TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.name: Faithful Followers
TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.description: Gain a copy of every unlocked 4-cost champion.

TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.name: Crumbling Sands
TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.description: Next combat: Stun all enemies for 2 seconds.

TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.name: Rite Of Negation
TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.description: Next combat: Shurimans gain 15% Damage Amp and crowd control immunity.

TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.name: Persistent Arcanery
TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.description: Next combat: Xerath gains 2 Mana Regen and his spell fires 3 extra blasts.

TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.name: Ascended's Call
TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.description: Next combat: Shurimans gain 1% %i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP% per second. After 22 seconds, gain 200% %i:scaleAS%.

TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.name: Scale Of Judgment
TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.description: Next combat: If you win, gain 12 gold; if you lose, gain 5 player health.

TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.name: Oasis's Reprieve
TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.description: Next combat: After 10 seconds, your team rapidly recovers 25% maximum Health.

TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.name: Fateful Find
TFTSet16/Set16_XerathZaps/TFT16_XerathZa.description: Roll 3 dice. Gain gold equal to the sum.
